### Root Cause

### Fix

### How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Verified the bug is reproducible before the fix
- [ ] Verified the fix resolves the issue
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated to prevent regression
- [ ] Edge cases tested

### Impact Assessment

- **Affected modules:** List the modules or components affected by this change
- **Risk level:** Low / Medium / High
- **Breaking changes:** Yes / No (if yes, describe below)

### Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's Python style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective
- [ ] All existing and new unit tests pass

### Additional Notes

Add any other context, screenshots, or details about the bug fix here.
